name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Met during freshman orientation at university. We bonded over late-night study sessions and bad dining hall food. She's now a graphic designer in NYC.

name: James Okafor
bio: My first manager at my previous job. He taught me everything about product thinking and how to communicate with stakeholders. Still meets me for coffee every month.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: We grew up on the same street and spent every summer together. Her family and mine are still very close. She recently moved back to town after working abroad for 3 years.

name: Marco Delgado
bio: We met backpacking through Southeast Asia and ended up travelling together for 3 weeks. Completely spontaneous friendship. We still plan trips together every year.

name: Aisha Rahman
bio: We lived together for two years during undergrad. She always kept the apartment surprisingly tidy and introduced me to proper cooking. Now she's doing her PhD in environmental science.

name: Liam Thornton
bio: We worked side-by-side for four years at our last company. He was the first person I told when I got a new job offer. Best person to grab a pint with after a rough week.

name: Chen Wei
bio: We met in an online gaming community five years ago and have been friends ever since. We finally met in person last year and it felt like we'd known each other forever.

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
bio: She moved next door three years ago and quickly became one of my closest friends. We share books, recipes, and childcare on busy days. Life got hectic for both of us lately.
